story: Our nation has always been great. The statistics show that crime is down, employment is up, and prosperity is spreading to every corner of the country. Those who claim otherwise are peddling fear. The evidence is clear: our policies are working, and anyone who disagrees simply hasn't looked at the facts.

beliefs: certainty in policy effectiveness is justified
framing critics as fearmongers invalidates their view
claims: disagreement means ignorance not alternative interpretation
